summary: Phase 1 Bug Fixes Testing Complete. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified. Key features tested: admin user deletion frees email for re-registration, contact email settings (DB-managed), bug reports API and UI, admin panel settings and bug-reports tabs.

1_admin_user_deletion_frees_email.details: register→admin delete→re-register same email: all steps succeed. DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} removes user from DB, password_resets, user_reports. Re-registration returns 200 with token.

2_get_contact_email_no_auth.details: GET /api/settings/contact-email returns 200 without auth, returns {email: string}. Returns empty string if not set.

3_put_contact_email_admin_only.details: PUT /api/admin/settings/contact-email requires admin auth (401/403 without). Updates value in DB, verified with subsequent GET. Invalid email (no @) returns 400.

4_post_bug_reports_authenticated.details: POST /api/bug-reports requires auth (401/403 without). Accepts report_type, description, page_url, browser_info. Returns {message}. All 5 types accepted: app_error, not_working, suggestion, security, other.

5_get_admin_bug_reports.details: GET /api/admin/bug-reports requires admin auth. Returns list with user_id, username, report_type, description, page_url, browser_info, status='new', created_at fields.

6_update_bug_report_status.details: PUT /api/admin/bug-reports/{id}/status updates status to new/investigating/fixed. Invalid status returns 400.

7_footer_bug_report_btn.details: Footer shows 'Nahlásit problém' button (data-testid=report-bug-btn) ONLY for authenticated users. Bug icon included. NOT visible on auth page.

8_bug_report_modal.details: Modal opens with: dropdown (data-testid=bug-type-select), textarea (data-testid=bug-description-input), submit button (data-testid=submit-bug-report-btn). All elements found and functional.

9_submit_bug_report_toast.details: Submitting bug report shows success toast 'Hlášení odesláno, děkujeme!'. Modal closes after submission. Form resets.

10_admin_settings_tab.details: Admin settings tab (data-testid=settings-tab) visible. Contains community password card AND contact email card. new-contact-email-input, save-contact-email-btn found. Save shows 'Kontaktní email byl změněn!' toast.

11_admin_bug_reports_tab.details: Bug reports tab (data-testid=bug-reports-tab) visible with notification badge for new reports. Tab content shows bug report cards with status badge, type label, username, date. Expand shows page_url, browser_info, status buttons (Nové/Řeší se/Vyřešeno).

12_admin_password_reset_no_button.details: admin_send_reset HTML email has NO <a href=...> clickable button. Only plain URL text in styled div. Verified by code inspection. User-initiated reset email retains button (separate feature).

action_items: INFO: User-initiated password reset email (reset_password_request) still has a clickable <a href> button with text 'Obnovit heslo'. If requirement 'Password reset email button removed' applies to ALL reset emails (not just admin-send), this needs to be addressed in reset_password_request function (~line 510 in server.py).
INFO: server.py is now ~1825 lines, exceeds 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into router modules.
critical_code_review_comments: User-initiated reset email (POST /auth/reset-password-request) still has clickable <a href> button at line ~511. Admin send has no button (correct). If original requirement applies to both, remove the <a> button from user-initiated reset email too.
server.py: 1825 lines - should be split into router modules (auth_router, admin_router, bug_reports_router etc.)
BugReportModal.jsx missing axios auth header - relies on axios global interceptor set by AuthContext. Verify AuthContext sets axios.defaults.headers.Authorization on login.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created ~15 TEST_ prefixed bug reports and 2 test users (registered and deleted). Contact email updated to 'admin-test-contact@bloom.cz' during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 bug fixes all verified. New endpoints: DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} (frees email), GET /api/settings/contact-email (public), PUT /api/admin/settings/contact-email (admin), POST /api/bug-reports (auth), GET /api/admin/bug-reports (admin), PUT /api/admin/bug-reports/{id}/status (admin). Frontend: footer has report-bug-btn, BugReportModal.jsx is the modal component, AdminPage.js has settings-tab and bug-reports-tab. Contact email test data: admin-test-contact@bloom.cz. Admin user id from previous report: 664b4ff1-1f1f-413b-ac27-8aa9abecb8b4 (test1@bloom.cz).
